---
title: "04 | Sacrifice"
author: "C.O."
date: "April 2026"
draft: false
---

Sacrifice is giving up something or doing something when you don’t want to. When we sacrifice, it usually involves focusing on the greater good for ourselves or others. LORD may our sacrifices uplift us and bring glory to your name!

Meditate on these verses to gain wisdom:

- Week 1
  -  Psalms 116:17
- Week 2
  - Hebrews 13:16
- Week 3
  - Isaiah 56:7
- Week 4 
  - Philippians 2:16-17
